note: As-built set. before/ holds the plan-time flowchart-only baseline for the before/after compare.

diagrams.title: As-built hybrid pipeline: classify → flowchart/native/fallback → outputs + diagnostics
As-built modules: router, native readers/models, geometry (ports), renderers, diagnostics, theme-map
Runtime routing: classify → sync flowchart / native re-skin / mermaid fallback (with honest failure)
